issuetype.name: Feature

content.text: Unify elements icons in Dashboard to enhance consistency and clarity.
Note how the icons are different for fact metric and advanced metrics in DATASETS and Metric Editor.
The component level test is tracked as P1 and covered well by Scrum team. The End2End validation and main workflow is conducted by me.
: code change for this feature is quite straightforward, happening to Web repos to replace the icons with the new icon, make the icon unified.
To ensure this feature quality, from End2End, different editors in the dashboard are covered in the validation, including:
defects were logged. Till now, 12 defects have been fixed. The left 5 defects plan is: 3(BCED-4321 and BCED-4325, BCED-4326) are planned to fix and the left 2 will be in the list with low priority.
Key Icon replacement has been validated across various platforms(Library Web, Authoring Web, Workstation), also covered different browsers.
No concern since it’s GUI icon replacement.
[BCED-4249] Automation | Unify elements icons in Dashboard to enhance consistency and clarity - Strategy Jira
It has been automated and added into Regression.
